CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2014 Off Calendar

Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account For The Benefit Of Minor: Mugisha Mutahaba
Off Calendar Nov-04-2014 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of Minor Mugisha Mutahaba
Off Calendar Sep-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Miles Lendway, CSR#13684.
Joel H. Giegal, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Mildred Kayondo, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Mugisha Mutahaba. Petitioner and minor present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $150,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $45,000.00 payable to Joel H. Siegal.
Costs: $14,553.27
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement or judgment.
A net balance of $90,446.73 to be deposited into a blocked account at Citi Bank 444 Castro Street, San Francisco, 94114 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on November 13, 2014 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
